items.title_en: European stocks open lower as ceasefire optimism fades
items.title_zh: 停火乐观情绪消退，欧洲股市低开
items.desc_en: European stock markets opened broadly lower on Friday, as uncertainty over a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal weighs on investor sentiment.
items.desc_zh: 欧洲股市周五开盘普遍走低，因美国与伊朗潜在和平协议的不确定性打压了投资者情绪。

items.title_en: TSMC shares jump to record high as Taiwan eases single-stock investment caps for funds
items.title_zh: 台湾放宽基金单一股票投资上限 台积电股价跃升至历史新高
items.desc_en: TSMC, whose shares had a hit a record high on Thursday as well, last week reported a 58% increase in first-quarter profit.
items.desc_zh: 台积电周四股价也创下历史新高，上周公布第一季度利润增长 58%。

items.title_en: Pentagon email floats suspending Spain from NATO, other steps over Iran rift, Reuters reports
items.title_zh: 据路透社报道，五角大楼电子邮件中提出暂停西班牙加入北约，以及针对伊朗分歧采取的其他措施
items.desc_en: An internal Pentagon email outlines options for the U.S. to punish NATO allies it believes failed to support its efforts in Iran, a U.S. official told Reuters.
items.desc_zh: 一位美国官员告诉路透社，五角大楼的一封内部电子邮件概述了美国惩罚其认为未能支持其在伊朗行动的北约盟友的选项。

items.title_en: China's DeepSeek releases preview of long-awaited V4 model as AI race intensifies

items.desc_en: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has released a preview version of its long awaited V4 large language model.
items.desc_zh: 中国人工智能初创公司 DeepSeek 发布了期待已久的 V4 大语言模型的预览版。

items.title_en: Alibaba’s Qwen AI is coming to cars, allowing drivers order food and book hotels by voice
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴的 Qwen AI 即将进入汽车领域，让司机可以通过语音订餐和预订酒店
items.desc_en: Alibaba is rolling out its Qwen AI across multiple car brands, promising hands-free features like ordering meals and managing deliveries from the driver’s seat.
items.desc_zh: 阿里巴巴正在多个汽车品牌推出 Qwen AI，承诺提供免提功能，例如在驾驶座上订餐和管理送货。

items.title_zh: 从科学家到丝农：印度丝绸业的复兴

items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_zh: 特朗普称以色列与黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周
items.desc_en: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by three weeks following a meeting in the White House with top U.S. officials, President Donald Trump said.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，在白宫与美国高级官员举行会议后，以色列和黎巴嫩同意将停火期限延长三周。

items.title_zh: 美国政府监管机构调查爱泼斯坦文件发布

items.desc_zh: CNBC Pro 筛选了下周发布季度财务报告的股票，其中每股收益至少有 75% 超出预期。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: Meta will cut 10% of workforce as company pushes deeper into AI
items.title_zh: 随着公司深入人工智能领域，Meta 将裁员 10%
items.desc_en: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, equaling about 8,000 employees, as the company continues to ramp up investments in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 随着公司继续加大对人工智能的投资，Meta 计划裁员 10%，相当于约 8,000 名员工。

items.title_en: Owning the stage: Look past Live Nation's legal troubles to see a growing, high-margin venue business

items.desc_en: Live Nation's stock hasn't caught up to the possibility that the company, once freed from its legal overhang, can capture more fan dollars.
items.desc_zh: Live Nation 的股价还没有赶上该公司一旦摆脱法律困境就能获得更多粉丝收入的可能性。

items.title_en: Woman killed by bear in Polish forest, son and local government say
items.title_zh: 儿子和当地政府称，一名妇女在波兰森林中被熊杀死
items.desc_en: In an extremely rare fatal encounter, the 58-year-old was killed as she was walking in a mountainous area, her son told rescuers.
items.desc_zh: 她的儿子告诉救援人员，在一次极其罕见的致命遭遇中，这位 58 岁的妇女在山区行走时身亡。

items.title_en: Masked Iranian forces appear to seize ships in staged video
items.title_zh: 蒙面伊朗军队在视频中似乎扣押了船只
items.desc_en: Analysis indicates that parts of the video appear to have been filmed hours after the ships were reportedly seized.
items.desc_zh: 分析表明，视频的部分内容似乎是在据报道船只被扣押数小时后拍摄的。

items.title_en: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.title_zh: 攀登高峰季节，巨大的冰川阻挡了珠穆朗玛峰的路线
items.desc_en: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.desc_zh: 夏尔巴人无法准备通往世界最高峰的路线，因为路上有一块巨大的冰块。

items.title_en: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉BBC，金的访问“绝对”有助于修复与英国的关系
items.desc_en: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.desc_zh: 在接受英国广播公司北美编辑的电话采访时，总统讨论了下周的访问以及他与英国首相的关系。

items.title_en: Microsoft plans first voluntary employee buyout in company's 51-year history
items.title_zh: 微软计划进行公司 51 年历史上的首次员工自愿买断
items.desc_en: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
items.desc_zh: 微软首次自愿买断将向高级主管级别及以下级别的员工开放，他们的工作年限和年龄合计达到 70 岁或以上。

items.title_en: South Africa's president suspends police chief after court charges
items.title_zh: 南非总统在法庭指控后暂停警察局长职务
items.desc_en: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.desc_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
items.title_zh: 律师称，因社交媒体帖子而在科威特被关押的美国科威特记者被无罪释放
items.desc_en: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，艾哈迈德·谢哈布-埃尔丁在转发与伊朗战争有关的图片后面临包括散布虚假信息在内的指控。

items.title_zh: 调查发现坦桑尼亚选举暴力事件造成500多人死亡
items.desc_en: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.
items.desc_zh: 反对党指责安全部队，但官方报告没有说明谁应对此负责。

items.title_en: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何打击美国房屋建筑商
items.desc_en: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.
items.desc_zh: 许多建筑供应商报告称，从泡沫隔热材料、屋顶到门窗，四月份所有产品的价格都上涨了。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
items.title_zh: 这些图表显示伊朗经济如何自由落体
items.desc_en: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的强硬言论掩盖了该政权和伊朗公民面临的残酷现实：其经济在战前就已经脆弱不堪，而现在却已支离破碎。

items.title_en: How the Iran war has stoked competition between India and China for Russian oil
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何加剧印度和中国对俄罗斯石油的竞争
items.desc_en: As the Iran war drags on and the Strait of Hormuz stays shut, India and China are increasingly competing against each other for shrinking crude oil supplies.
items.desc_zh: 随着伊朗战争的拖延和霍尔木兹海峡的关闭，印度和中国日益激烈地争夺日益萎缩的原油供应。

items.desc_zh: 这起事故于周四早些时候发生在哥本哈根北部的一个平交道口。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
